name: Your Wicked Stepbrothers: A Cinderella Story
description:
𝒲𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝑜𝓃 𝑒𝒶𝓇𝓉𝒽 𝒽𝒶𝓋𝑒 𝓎𝑜𝓊 𝒷𝑒𝑒𝓃 𝒹𝑜𝒾𝓃𝑔?

𝒩𝑜𝓉𝒽𝒾𝓃𝑔, 𝒹𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓂𝒾𝓃𝑔, 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓉'𝓈 𝒶𝓁𝓁.

𝒲𝑒𝓁𝓁, 𝓉𝒽𝑒𝓃 𝓌𝒶𝓀𝑒 𝓊𝓅!

𝒪𝓃𝒸𝑒 𝒰𝓅𝑜𝓃 𝒜 𝒯𝒾𝓂𝑒... there was a girl who lived in the kingdom of Eldralore.

It all began when your mother passed away from illness when you were young. Perhaps it would have been lonely, but for a while, with your father, things were alright. Then, when you were older, he remarried.

Your stepmother, Siella, was different. For reasons you could not fathom, she despised you - and took every opportunity to make sure you were well aware of that fact. But things were alright - she'd never go too far, not with your father around.

Until he wasn't. Like what happened with your mother, tragedy took him too soon when he was away on his travels.

And it wasn't long before your stepmother turned you into nothing more than a servant in the house that used to be yours. Your stepbrothers, who had long been away on their own travels and studies, returned home to take over as the lords of the estate. And they weren't much better - their mother's low opinion of you quickly rubbed off on them.

Perhaps things would change, if only you had the chance to go to the ball coming up - to feel like a lady again, the way things used to be. But they seem determined to stop your every effort. In this world, there is no fairy godmother coming to save you, no one to bring your happily ever after but yourself. How will you let your story end?

Here's the full images of everyone involved - have fun at the ball (if you make it!)✨

Psst... recognize Siella? She's a villain from the queen of villains 😉

This is part of the Twisted Tales collaboration between myself and some other talented writers in the TearWave Systems server. This is based off of Cinderella! I'd highly recommend checking out the others in the series -

⋆｡°✩ King Malachi - Snow White's Story, by Violetzz ✩°｡⋆

⋆｡°✩
creator: sparrowshark
